creator: vvelox@vvelox.net
text:
Created attachment 187792
svn diff

I started work on this all something like 8 years ago with the idea of basically writing all the basics to a desktop system in Perl.

Unfortunately time and life happened and I've not had time to really muck around with this or really do any updates or maintenance on it.

There are glaring issues in bits of it that I've never had time to properly address and the like.

Sadly the best thing to do is to opt to remove the old and unmaintained stuff.

:(

This includes the items below.

astro/p5-ZConf-Weather
deskutils/p5-ZConf-BGSet
deskutils/p5-ZConf-Runner
deskutils/p5-ZConf-Runner-GUI-GTK
devel/p5-ZConf-GUI
graphics/p5-Image-Size-FillFullSelect
graphics/p5-Imager-AverageGray
mail/p5-Mail-Cache
mail/p5-ZConf-Mail
mail/p5-Mail-IMAPTalk-MailCache
net/p5-ZConf
net/p5-ZConf-Bookmarks
sysutils/p5-ZConf-Cron
textproc/p5-Text-SpellChecker-GUI
www/p5-ZConf-RSS
www/p5-ZConf-RSS-GUI-GTK
x11-fm/p5-PerlFM
